title: Contact International Social Security Agreements - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact International Social Security Agreements
Information about pensions and benefits for those who lived or a living  outside of Canada
You can complete the following tasks online:
- Download International Social Security Agreements forms (You will first need to select your country on the page)
You can complete the following tasks by calling:
- apply or update direct deposit
- get various Canada  Pension Plan (CPP)/Old Age Security (OAS) documents  including:
- get a CPP/OAS  estimate
- request or cancel voluntary  tax withholds (for Canadian residents only)
- report when a payment was not  received to open an investigation and receive a duplicate
- cancel benefits in case of  death
Please ensure you have your Social Insurance Number  available before you call.
Canada and the United States Toll-free: 1-800-454-8731 Canada and the United States TTY: 1-800-255-4786 Outside Canada and the United States: 1-613-957-1954 (Call collect) The hours of operation are 8:30 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Eastern time, Monday to Friday.
For information about the service standard and average wait times to speak to an agent, please see the information for the Canada Pension Plan and Old Age Security call centres.
You can complete the following tasks by mail:
- Submit an application and/or  supporting documents
- Change or update personal  information or direct deposit
- Get various CPP-OAS documents  including:
- Request or cancel voluntary  tax withholds (for Canadians residents only)
- Cancel benefits in case of  death
Select the  appropriate country for mailing address and contact details .
You can complete the following tasks at a Service Canada office:
- Submit an application and/or supporting  documents
- Get general information about  CPP and OAS programs
- Get general information about  International Social Security Agreements
To access information on your specific file visit My Service Canada Account
Find a  Service Canada office near you
